title: Saajan Ki Bahon Mein
desc: Lovers Sagar and Sapna separate due to her father's opposition and meet after many years. However, Sagar reveals that he is to marry Kavita, while Sapna is about to be engaged to Rakesh.

title: Gumnaam
desc: An aspiring director reluctantly becomes a police officer. Soon after, he starts investigating a serial murder case wherein the killer targets teenage girls.

title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
desc: When stars misalign, love blossoms between an astrology-obsessed idler and a headstrong fish heiress whose father will settle for nothing less than a hardworking son-in-law.

title: Jaanwar
desc: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Akhanda
desc: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
desc: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.
